description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build and typecheck. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOS-latest with Python 3.9, checking out the repository, setting up Python, creating a virtual environment, installing dependencies with poetry, running tests with make test, and packaging with pyinstaller. The typecheck job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9, performing similar steps but only for type checking with make typecheck.
